title: Simple Text Statusline - Statuslines
author: JSONbored
detailMarkdown:
# Simple Text Statusline - Statuslines

Ultra-lightweight plain text statusline with no colors or special characters for maximum compatibility and minimal overhead

## Trust
- Source: source not provided
- Package: no package download
- Review: unclaimed

## Config
```json
{
  "statusLine": {
    "type": "command",
    "command": "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/statuslines/simple-text-statusline.sh",
    "refreshInterval": 300
  }
}
```

## Usage
[Model: claude-sonnet-4.5] [Dir: ~/projects/my-app] [Tokens: 1234]
